message:
feat(demo_showcase): Implement preview panel with PixelBuffer/Grayscale demos

Add enhanced preview panel showcasing graphics capabilities:
- Animated gradient orb using PixelBuffer with HSV color rotation
- Sparkline FPS chart using GrayscaleBuffer with Unicode shade blocks
- Alpha blending glass overlay displaying memory and CPU metrics
- Focus highlighting and proper border styling

Also includes Toast notification system implementation (ToastLevel,
Toast, ToastManager) added by collaborative agent work.

Implements bd-qn5.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
